notes: Values are extracted from the uploaded Excel file.
Dash and blank cells were converted to JSON null.
SORF and BLRF records are kept in one dataset because they were present in the same source workbook.
No independent engineering code validation has been performed on the dimensional values.

field_dictionary.type: Flange type from Excel, for example SORF or BLRF.
field_dictionary.nps: Nominal Pipe Size display value in inches.
field_dictionary.nps_in: Nominal Pipe Size as decimal inch, useful for sorting/filtering.
field_dictionary.flange_diameter_D_mm: Flange outside diameter D in mm.
field_dictionary.flange_height_h_mm: Height h in mm where applicable.
field_dictionary.raised_face_diameter_d1_mm: Raised face diameter d1 in mm.
field_dictionary.pitch_circle_diameter_k_mm: Bolt pitch circle diameter k in mm.
field_dictionary.bolt_hole_diameter_d2_mm: Bolt hole diameter d2 in mm.
field_dictionary.hub_diameter_d3_mm: Hub diameter d3 in mm where applicable.
field_dictionary.raised_face_height_f_mm: Raised face height f in mm.
field_dictionary.pipe_hole_diameter_d4_mm: Pipe hole diameter d4 in mm where applicable.
field_dictionary.weight_W_kg: Weight W in kg where provided.
field_dictionary.source_excel_row: Original row number in the uploaded Excel sheet.
